OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on WED-OCT-22-2008: Arnold Walter Evje, counsel for plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.; Kevin Ogans, representative, appearing on behalf of plaintiff; Tyler MacMillan, counsel by limited scope representation for defendant Billy Tate

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 34 Sixth Street, #107, San Francisco, California. The OCT-27-2007 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Cary Kletter, Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (218)
